data.name: Lustful Dreamers
data.detailed_description:
You find yourself trapped within the dreams of succubi. You must flee with all your might from their demonic grasp. ...That is, if you can escape those enormous breasts.

In the succubi's dreams, you'll be chased and subjected to various temptations.

If you're caught or succumb to temptation, you'll be dominated~

Should you completely yield to the succubi, you'll be trapped within the dream and unable to escape.

You'll be forced to spend eternity with them.


・3 playable characters

・9 main HCG types + several variations

・All CG scenes animated

・Save data with unlocked memory room included

・Playtime: 1-2 hours to clear


※Important Notice

We have confirmed that in some environments, anime playback speed may become significantly faster than intended. This appears to occur when “GPU scheduling by Windows hardware accelerator” is enabled. If you encounter this bug, please try disabling “GPU scheduling by Windows hardware accelerator” in the Advanced graphics settings under System > Display > Graphics in Windows Settings.

data.short_description: You find yourself trapped within the dreams of succubi. You must flee with all your might from their demonic grasp. ...That is, if you can escape those enormous breasts.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 35 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 150 MB 可用空間
